hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi tío / Verbo: arreglar (infinitivo) / Complemento: el coche / Verbo: poder (habilidad/posibilidad) / Complemento: ir al viaje familiar
spanishSentence: Si mi tío no arregla el coche, no podremos ir al viaje familiar.
correctSentence: If my uncle doesn't fix the car, we won't be able to go on the family trip.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi abuelo / Verbo: plantar (acción condicional negativa) / Complemento: verduras en el jardín / Verbo: tener (modal negativo - consecuencia) / Complemento: productos frescos / Tiempo: este verano
spanishSentence: Si mi abuelo no planta verduras en el jardín, no tendremos productos frescos este verano.
correctSentence: If my grandfather doesn't plant vegetables in the garden, we won't have fresh produce this summer.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi prima / Verbo: venir (condición) / Complemento: a la playa / Verbo: nadar (resultado de la condición) / Complemento: con nosotros
spanishSentence: Si mi prima viene a la playa, ella nadará con nosotros.
correctSentence: If my cousin comes to the beach, she will swim with us.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: la familia / Verbo: celebrar (en condicional, con 'si') / Complemento: juntos/juntas / Verbo: crear (en futuro simple) / Complemento: hermosos recuerdos
spanishSentence: Si la familia celebra junta, crearán hermosos recuerdos.
correctSentence: If the family celebrates together, they will create beautiful memories.

hints: Complemento: a una casa más grande

spanishSentence: Si mis padres no se mudan a una casa más grande, no tendremos suficiente espacio para todos.
correctSentence: If my parents don't move to a bigger house, we won't have enough space for everyone.

hints: Verbo: soler (hábito, infinitivo en estructura comparativa)

spanishSentence: Si no nos visitamos el próximo verano, no jugaremos juntos como solemos hacerlo.
correctSentence: If we don't visit each other next summer, we won't play together like we usually do.

hintDisplay: Sujeto: mi abuela / Verbo: hornear (acción en presente condicional) / Complemento: un pastel / Sujeto: yo / Verbo: ayudar (acción en futuro) / Complemento: a decorarlo
spanishSentence: Si mi abuela hornea un pastel, la ayudaré a decorarlo.
correctSentence: If my grandmother bakes a cake, I will help her decorate it.

correctSentence: If my aunt designs a new house, I will help her with the decorations.

correctSentence: If my siblings organize a family reunion, I will invite all our relatives.

correctSentence: If we have time next weekend, we will cook a special meal together as cousins.

correctSentence: If my aunt visits us next weekend, I will photograph the whole family together.

correctSentence: If my parents don't travel next summer, we won't visit our grandparents.

correctSentence: If my grandfather carves the wood, he will make a beautiful sculpture for our family.

correctSentence: If my siblings compete with me, I will do my best to win the game.

correctSentence: If the family doesn't reunite next summer, they won't be able to celebrate together.

correctSentence: If my grandmother knits a sweater, I will wear it every winter.

correctSentence: If my grandfather visits us this weekend, he will tell us stories about his youth.
